problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: If Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry is applied to and, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
